description_long: This is a yellow van with a boxy, utilitarian shape, featuring a flat roof and rounded edges. The exterior is painted with a pattern of brown spots and graffiti, giving it a playful, cartoonish appearance reminiscent of SpongeBob SquarePants. The van has blacked-out windows on the sides and rear, with some windows displaying hand-written messages and colorful doodles. The wheels are simple, with red hubcaps and black tires, and the lower body is accented with a red stripe. The rear of the van has more graffiti, including text and colorful markings, and the front is characterized by a wide windshield and rectangular headlights. The overall look suggests a whimsical, possibly themed or promotional vehicle, rather than a standard commercial van.
description: A yellow, graffiti-covered van with cartoonish brown spots, blacked-out windows, and red wheels, featuring playful doodles and text on its sides and rear.
description_view_0: Left side view showing two blacked-out windows, brown spots, graffiti, and red wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting two rear windows with hand-written messages, colorful graffiti, and a yellow bumper.
description_view_2: Right side view with similar brown spots, graffiti, and two blacked-out windows, plus red wheels.
description_view_3: Front view showing a wide windshield with graffiti, rectangular headlights, and a slightly dented bumper.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
